basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC Insurance Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) Insurance Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website of TMC ACTREC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TMC ACTREC Insurance Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation may be relaxed on experience basis.

qualification.education_qualification: B.com/M.Com/MBA (Finance)/MHA with minimum 01 Year experience in handling cashless insurance in at least a 100-bedded hospital.
qualification.details: B.com/M.Com/MBA (Finance)/MHA with minimum 01 Year experience in handling cashless insurance in at least a 100-bedded hospital.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the TMC ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the TMC ACTREC recruitment is Insurance Supervisor.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Insurance Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the Insurance Supervisor post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 11 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Insurance Supervisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Com/M.Com/MBA (Finance)/MHA with at least 01 year of experience in handling cashless insurance in a 100-bedded hospital.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Insurance Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Insurance Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the TMC ACTREC located?
faq.answer: TMC ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210.
